articles.title: Rain, lightning, strong winds to lash Odisha; IMD issues orange warning for 9 districts - Odisha TV
articles.full_text:
The Regional Meteorological Centre (RMC) issued an Orange Warning on Friday for nine districts across Odisha.
The warning comes as several parts of the state are expected to experience thunderstorms accompanied by rainfall and strong winds.
Orange Warning For Nine Districts
According to the RMC, nine districts have been placed under an Orange Warning, while several others are expected to experience rain and gusty winds.
Sundargarh, Keonjhar, Mayurbhanj, Nuapada, Bolangir, Kandhamal, Kalahandi, Rayagada and Gajapati are likely to witness thunderstorms accompanied by rainfall, with wind speeds reaching 40 to 50 kmph.
The RMC also predicted thunderstorms and rainfall over the coastal districts and adjoining interior areas. In view of the prevailing conditions, a Yellow Warning has been issued for 21 districts.
Fresh Weather Alert For Tomorrow
The meteorological department also issued an Orange Warning for Kalahandi, Bolangir, Sonepur, Boudh and Kandhamal for Saturday, where thunderstorms accompanied by lightning and rainfall are likely.

Residents are advised to remain alert as adverse weather conditions are likely to prevail over the next 24 hours.
